title: Senior Financial Analyst - ET Money - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ET Money - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
